name: proc_creation_win_cmd_redirection_susp_folder
raw_query: any where (process.executable:"*\\cmd.exe" or process.pe.original_file_name:"Cmd.Exe") and ((process.command_line like~ ("*>?%APPDATA%\\*", "*>?%TEMP%\\*", "*>?%TMP%\\*", "*>?%USERPROFILE%\\*", "*>?C:\\ProgramData\\*", "*>?C:\\Temp\\*", "*>?C:\\Users\\Public\\*", "*>?C:\\Windows\\Temp\\*")) or ((process.command_line like~ ("* >*", "*\">*", "*'>*")) and (process.command_line:"*C:\\Users\\*" and process.command_line:"*\\AppData\\Local\\*")))
